alkylation reagent: alkylated for 30 min with 50 mM iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylated for 30 min with 50 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: digested with 1 μg trypsin gold (Promega) for 16 h at 37 °C
collision energy: the trap collision energy was set at 90 eV
enrichment method: phosphopeptide fractions (Fig. 6A), as detailed in the Experimental procedures section
fragmentation method: top-20 multiply charged precursors selected for EThcD fragmentation
instrument: analyzed by nano-flow UHPLC–ESI–MS/MS on an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer
labeling: the quantitative proteomics experiment illustrated in Figure 6A
